things.name: Walled City (Ciudad Amurallada)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage perfectly preserved Spanish colonial city ringed by 13km of walls

things.name: Castillo San Felipe de Barajas
things.description: Largest Spanish fort in the Americas - explore the underground labyrinth of tunnels

things.name: Bocagrande Beach
things.description: The Copacabana of Colombia - beachfront high-rises along the Caribbean

things.name: Rosario Islands Snorkelling
things.description: Coral reefs and crystal water in the Rosario Archipelago 1-hour speedboat from Cartagena

things.name: Palacio de la Inquisicion
things.description: 18th-century Spanish Inquisition palace with original torture devices on display

things.name: Gold Museum (Museo del Oro Zenú)
things.description: Pre-Columbian gold objects of the Zenú people of the Caribbean coast

things.name: Convento de la Popa
things.description: 17th-century hilltop convent with the best views over Cartagena

things.name: Getsemani Neighbourhood
things.description: Former slave neighbourhood transformed into the coolest street-art quarter in Colombia

things.name: Horse Carriage Ride in the Old City
things.description: Evening carriage ride through the colonial streets to the Torre del Reloj

things.name: Ceviche & Arepa de Huevo
things.description: Caribbean Colombian ceviche with coconut milk and crispy egg-stuffed arepa
